findingDetails.title: Live runtime uses stale generated code-graph scope globs after plural rename
findingDetails.recommendation: Rebuild mcp_server/dist from TypeScript and add release guards for singular root path literals in generated runtime outputs.

findingDetails.title: Command-owned deep-review/deep-research YAML reads non-existent sk-deep-* skill paths
findingDetails.recommendation: Replace sk-deep-review/sk-deep-research with deep-review/deep-research and dry-run both command workflows.

findingDetails.title: Skill advisor source still writes .opencode/skill/.advisor-state
findingDetails.recommendation: Move advisor state to a plural or neutral cache path and add a root singular-directory guard.

findingDetails.title: Packet 096 validation failure localizes to parent and 004-symlinks anchor/doc sufficiency defects
findingDetails.recommendation: Repair parent and 004-symlinks validation defects and rerun recursive strict validation.

findingDetails.title: Deep-loop artifact resolver accepts malformed spec_folder values that redirect review writes outside the approved packet
findingDetails.recommendation: Reject empty, whitespace, template, traversal, and out-of-spec-root folders before resolving artifact roots; validate all artifact paths stay inside the packet root.

findingDetails.title: Claude Stop hook executes an env-selected autosave script before canonical path validation
findingDetails.recommendation: Remove production env script override or require a test-only flag plus realpath containment under the canonical generate-context script directory.

findingDetails.title: Deep-review YAML documents a Copilot target-authority guard that is not implemented or wired in the executor schema
findingDetails.recommendation: Remove the dead Copilot branch or implement/export buildCopilotPromptArg with malformed spec_folder tests before wiring cli-copilot.

evidence: Packet 096 strict validation failure carried forward from iteration 2

claim: Malformed spec_folder values can redirect deep-loop review/research artifacts outside the approved packet.
evidence: resolver dry-run: '.', whitespace, /tmp, template, and traversal inputs were accepted
recommendation: Validate spec_folder before artifact resolution and assert packet-local artifact containment after dispatch.

claim: Claude Stop autosave can execute an env-selected JavaScript file because SPECKIT_GENERATE_CONTEXT_SCRIPT is trusted before canonical script paths.
recommendation: Remove production env script override or constrain it to a canonical realpath under the generate-context script directory.

claim: The YAML's Copilot TARGET AUTHORITY guard is not implemented or wired in executor-config.ts.
recommendation: Remove the dead branch or implement/export buildCopilotPromptArg with malformed spec_folder tests before adding cli-copilot to the schema.

summary: Configured Claude, Codex, and Gemini hook command binaries resolved and referenced scripts exist; all checked hooks execute dist/hooks, making generated hook JS live runtime surface.

cli-codex branch uses approval_policy=never and workspace-write, but workflow path authority is prompt/code-level rather than enforced by a packet-local filesystem allowlist. Gemini and OpenCode config surfaces are more permissive if used.
Claude Stop honors SPECKIT_GENERATE_CONTEXT_SCRIPT before canonical autosave script candidates and executes the selected readable path.

evidence: Parsed hook commands from .claude/settings.local.json, .codex/settings.json, and .gemini/settings.json; every referenced dist/hooks script exists.
No checked hook command referenced .opencode/skill/, .opencode/agent/, .opencode/command/, or sk-deep-*.
Sampled OpenCode, Claude, Gemini, and Codex deep-review mirrors all include packet-local write-boundary language.
